title: roettlera punduana
intro: Roettlera punduana, also known as 'Tulsi', is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The medicinal properties of Roettlera punduana lie in its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Roettlera punduana include reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory health, and aiding in digestion. Roettlera punduana is often prepared as a herbal tea or used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
